description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall and features a large swimming pool in the backyard, surrounded by a paved patio and landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs. The house has large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. There are multiple outdoor living spaces, including balconies, terraces, and a covered patio area. The main entryway is accessible via a set of steps and is accentuated by a minimalist design, with clean lines and subtle landscaping. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a swimming pool and landscaped greenery. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and contemporary outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front and side of the house, showing the main entry steps, a balcony, and the boundary wall with landscaping.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the full length of the swimming pool, a large tree, and the extensive patio area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: The rear view showcases the swimming pool, patio, and multiple outdoor seating areas, as well as the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the landscaped front yard with decorative trees, the flat roof, and the side terrace with privacy hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with steps, no porch, and subtle landscaping
